utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: health_coverage is present with both physical and mental subcomponents including costs and details; property_coverage is present with plan, cost, and details; travel_coverage is null (missing); additional_services is null (missing); total_budget is present with monthly cost and a note, but lacks an annual breakdown. The format requires 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' for total_budget, so this is not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three items: EliteCare Premium Plan for physical health, EliteCare Premium Plan for mental health, and EliteHome Premium Coverage for property. From the ground-truth ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health) has a rating of 6; EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health) has a rating of 3; EliteHome Premium Coverage has a rating of 6. There is no travel coverage or additional services selected.
